articles.author: Kyle Huesmann
articles.title: OFFICIAL: Big Ten Women's Tournament Bracket - On3
articles.description: The bracket is officially set, and now, 15 teams will descend on Indianapolis for the Big Ten Women’s Basketball Tournament to battle for an automatic bid the NCAA Tournament. The Iowa Hawkeyes, champions in three of the last four years will enter the tournam…
